issue.title: [server] Harden refresh reissue against CSRF, rotation reuse, and Redis failures
issue.goal: Grill log item: secure the refresh-token pipeline. Make /api/auth/reissue POST-only, require a custom request header to reduce CSRF/RTR abuse, add refresh-token rotation with a short grace period and reuse detection, and apply Redis failure policies that fail open for access-token validation while failing closed for refresh-token reissue. Acceptance: refresh reuse is detected and revoked outside the grace window, concurrent legitimate refreshes are handled safely, access-token auth remains usable when Redis blacklist checks are unavailable, and refresh reissue is denied on Redis failure.
acceptanceCriteria: The issue "[server] Harden refresh reissue against CSRF, rotation reuse, and Redis failures" is resolved.

description: Grill log item: secure the refresh-token pipeline. Make /api/auth/reissue POST-only, require a custom request header to reduce CSRF/RTR abuse, add refresh-token rotation with a short grace period and reuse detection, and apply Redis failure policies that fail open for access-token validation while failing closed for refresh-token reissue. Acceptance: refresh reuse is detected and revoked outside the grace window, concurrent legitimate refreshes are handled safely, access-token auth remains usable when Redis blacklist checks are unavailable, and refresh reissue is denied on Redis failure.
